subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One, imagine not for a moment that I am heedless of the remembrance of the friends, or that I would ever grant My tongue a moment's rest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق گمان منما که دمی از یاد یاران فارغ مانم و یا آنکه دمی بیاسایم زبان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
